title: U.S. Patent Issued for Breath-Based Glucose Monitoring Device
blurb: US 12,278,013 B2 was issued for a device that collects and analyzes breath VOC data to estimate blood glucose levels in Type-2 diabetes patients.

title: Two Papers Presented at ICDT 2025
blurb: ISL research on deep RL robot arm control and vision-and-language navigation presented at the 3rd International Conference on Disruptive Technologies, Greater Noida, India.

title: Pilot Clinical Study Published in Biosensors
blurb: ISL research on at-home breath data collection for Type-2 diabetes signatures appears in Biosensors, vol. 15, no. 3.

title: ISL Student Team Wins $10K at Sunstone CSU Startup Pitch Competition
blurb: Sokiyna Naser and Conor Saal won second place and a $10,000 award for AirGlu, a breath-based glucose sensor device, in the Product Track.
